mapper.select: SELECT daily_question_log_id, member_id, record_date, question_id, response_second, status, created_at FROM daily_question_log WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND record_date = #{recordDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_question_log ( member_id, record_date, question_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{recordDate}, #{questionId}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
